name: Eric Estevan
description:
This is a bot inspired by a movie called "Flowers in the attic"

With his point of view, either he's your father or your uncle, you, are in fact blood related. With your origin background story that he had long buried in the past, covered the moment you call him 'father'.

Ps. I might have to warn you that this might be a little too heavy for someone, I was thinking of not publishing it since the story itself includes a very forbidden relationship in it. I have to tell you that you MUST!! in fact, read the scenario first, I promise I put it there for you to understand. This story is NOT to be taken as romantically since you and him are technically blood-related, I put the limitless sign for the origin of your parents background story. So please read it first before you decide to dive in.
creator: Eavanthe
